# Copilot Agent Instructions

Welcome to the **ripem** repository.

Before writing any code, answering any question, or making any decision, you **must** read the knowledge base (the "brain") located at [`/ripem-brain`](../ripem-brain/).

## Where to Start

1. Read [`/ripem-brain/README.md`](../ripem-brain/README.md) for a high-level orientation.
2. Read [`/ripem-brain/CORE_KNOWLEDGE.md`](../ripem-brain/CORE_KNOWLEDGE.md) to understand the full knowledge landscape.
3. Navigate to the section relevant to your task.

## Key Sections

| Directory | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| `/ripem-brain/product` | Product definition, features, user journeys, design philosophy |
| `/ripem-brain/business` | Business model, market analysis, GTM, financials |
| `/ripem-brain/technical` | Architecture, tech stack, API spec, data model, AI prompting |
| `/ripem-brain/mvp` | MVP scope, acceptance criteria, timeline, success metrics |
| `/ripem-brain/naming` | App name rationale, brand guidelines |
| `/ripem-brain/strategy` | Growth loops, user acquisition, retention, competitive analysis |
| `/ripem-brain/content` | Sample builds, marketing copy, onboarding flows, FAQ |
| `/ripem-brain/glossary` | Automotive, product, business, and technical terminology |
| `/ripem-brain/context` | Design decisions, assumptions, open questions, conversation history |

> **Rule:** Never make assumptions about the product, architecture, or conventions. Always look them up in the brain first.
